seoTitle: How to Delete a Squarespace Website and Start Fresh
metaDescription: Follow this guide to safely delete your Squarespace website, manage your domain afterward, and prepare for a clean, fresh rebuild.
intro: Sometimes the best move for a business or personal brand is to wipe the slate clean and start a new Squarespace site from scratch. This tutorial covers the exact steps to delete your existing site, what to do with your domain afterward, and how to prepare before you rebuild.

steps.heading: Understand reasons to start over
steps.body: Consider common situations that call for a fresh start, such as outgrowing your original design or needing to pivot your brand strategy.

steps.heading: Save content before deletion
steps.body: Back up any content, images, or text you want to keep before proceeding, since deletion removes your existing site setup.

steps.heading: Follow the step-by-step deletion process
steps.body: Go through Squarespace's deletion process carefully to remove your existing website.

steps.heading: Manage your domain after deletion
steps.body: Decide whether to reuse your existing domain on a new site or reassign it elsewhere after your old site is deleted.

steps.heading: Prepare for a successful relaunch
steps.body: Apply best practices for launching your new Squarespace site so the fresh start reflects your current brand and goals.

faq.question: Will I lose all my content if I delete my Squarespace site?
faq.answer: Yes, so the tutorial recommends saving any content you want to keep before starting the deletion process.

faq.question: What happens to my domain after I delete my site?
faq.answer: The tutorial covers how to manage your domain after deletion, including reusing it for a new site.

faq.question: Who typically needs to delete and restart a Squarespace site?
faq.answer: Entrepreneurs rebranding, freelancers adjusting their portfolio, and small business owners refreshing their offerings are common examples.

faq.question: Is deleting a site reversible?
faq.answer: The tutorial treats deletion as a deliberate step toward a fresh start, so it's important to back up anything you want to keep beforehand.

faq.question: Is this process beginner-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the tutorial provides straightforward, step-by-step instructions aimed at beginners as well as more experienced users.
